pdf_summary.notes: Very compact pricelist - 26 services covering general doctor exams, EKG/spirometry, basic interventions (wound care, immobilization, injections), gyn ultrasound, basic radiology (skeleton, lungs).

code_strategy.approach: Codes mostly reuse Cetinje state nomenclature shared with HN DZ. Items prefix _KO suffix on clinic_medical_services.code to keep them distinct from HN DZ codes. Items unique to Kolasin (recipe issuance, oxygen, IV/IM/SC injections) get KO_ prefix and inline translations.

application_steps: 1. Create the clinic row in DB (INSERT INTO clinics ...) and obtain its id
